message:
fix(ui): use STYLE_PANE_BASE for bulk actions modal background

The bulk actions modal was using root_style (STYLE_APP_ROOT) for the
draw_rect_filled background clear, while all other modals (inspector,
saved-views, export, help) use STYLE_PANE_BASE. This could cause
visual inconsistency in themes where the two styles differ.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
